title: colorama-py PyPI Package Typosquats colorama Terminal Coloring Library Targeting Python Developers
description: The malicious PyPI package colorama-py used a hyphenated suffix to typosquat the widely-used colorama Python library for colorizing terminal output, executing a postinstall payload that stole environment variables, SSH keys, and developer credentials from compromised systems.
label: AV-200

title: selemium PyPI Package Typosquats selenium Browser Automation Library Stealing CI/CD Environment Secrets
description: The malicious PyPI package selemium used a character transposition to typosquat the popular selenium browser automation library, targeting QA engineers and developers running automated browser tests by stealing CI/CD environment secrets and authentication tokens during package installation.
label: AV-200
